category_sources: Official grpc-web README documents protoc-gen-grpc-web client generation.

display_name_sources: Official grpc-web README refers to the compiler plugin as protoc-gen-grpc-web.

Official grpc-web helloworld example documents generated client usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/grpc/grpc-web, so repo was not re-determined.
